description: §6.8.2 whole-compound reset (RT): reset(@form) reverts EVERY field (name + email) to its own default=, in declaration order. The multi-field counterpart to reset-compound-field.
rationale: §6.8.2 compound reset: `reset(@form)` applies the reset rule to EVERY field of the compound (in declaration order) — each reverts to its own default=. fill() sets both to typed-*; resetAll() reverts both name→def-name and email→def-email.
